race.comment: GIDDY UP BANKCHECK (4) ran on strongly but just failed to pick up the winner last start over 1300m at Ararat. Has race fitness on his side now and has found a thin contest. Ready. TAAJWAR (5) has been kept fresh with a month between runs and finds a more suitable assignment this time. Has had plenty of chances but this isn't deep. LIBBY ANN (7) is another that finds the breakthrough elusive but does boast a decent record at this trip with four minor placings from five tries. Expected to be competitive. MANDARIN (8) turned in a nice run when fresh from a spell two starts back at Naracoorte but failed to follow it up last time. Fitter and is worth another chance.
